caveats: The upstream FLUX.2 reference was already invalid because it was illustration-styled and contained a second tail-like appendage.
The Pixal3D result inherits the ambiguous extra appendage and therefore cannot be treated as a clean riggable subject.
This candidate-specific stop is not evidence of a Pixal3D backend failure.
decisions.notes: Supersedes the causal interpretation in r1. The downstream Pixal3D reconstruction is preserved as faithful-inheritance evidence, but the first failing gate is upstream_flux2_reference_invalid. A photorealistic single-tail coat-only v2 reference must be reviewed before Pixal3D is run again.
